stat.title: Walk-off Wound Collectors
stat.subtitle: Games lost on an opponent walk-off.

notableEvents.label: Nick Loftin walk-off loss · Single
notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin singles on a soft bunt ground ball to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Josh Rojas scores. Tyler Tolbert to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell hit by pitch. Jose Siri scores. Vaughn Grissom to 3rd. Josh Lowe to 2nd.
